AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class XmlTagCommandConfig

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Immutable configuration object for an XML-driven tagging command.

public sealed class XmlTagCommandConfig
Inheritance
object
XmlTagCommandConfig
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
Extension Methods
UnitExtensions.ToUnitLabel(object)
ReflectionUtils.GetHighlightProperty(object)
ReflectionUtils.SetPropertyValue(object, PropertyInfo, object)
SystemExtensions.Cast<T>(object)

Remarks

Encapsulates the XML tag type key used to select rules from the annotation configuration file, along with user-facing strings for command title, selection prompt, and transaction naming.

Use Create(XmlTagKind, string, string) to obtain a configuration instance for a known tag kind, or Custom to supply a custom tag type and display name.

Properties

CommandTitle

Gets the command title displayed to the user (e.g., dialog/window title).

public string CommandTitle { get; }

Property Value

string

PickPrompt

Gets the prompt shown during interactive selection.

public string PickPrompt { get; }

Property Value

string

PlaceTransactionName

Gets the transaction name used for tag placement operations.

public string PlaceTransactionName { get; }

Property Value

string

XmlFilePath

Gets or sets the XML configuration file path used by the command.

public string XmlFilePath { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

This is intentionally mutable so the same configuration template can be reused with different file paths.

XmlTagType

Gets the XML tag type token used to filter rules (e.g., "SizeTag", "NumberTag").

public string XmlTagType { get; }

Property Value

string

Methods

Create(XmlTagKind, string, string)

Creates a command configuration for a known XML tag kind.

public static XmlTagCommandConfig Create(XmlTagKind tagKind, string customXmlTagType = null, string customDisplayName = null)

Parameters

tagKind XmlTagKind

The tag kind to create configuration for.

customXmlTagType string

When tagKind is Custom, provides the XML tag type token to use. Ignored for other values.

customDisplayName string

When tagKind is Custom, provides a user-friendly display name used in the command title/prompt/transaction name. If omitted, customXmlTagType is used. Ignored for other values.

Returns

XmlTagCommandConfig

A configured XmlTagCommandConfig instance.

Remarks

For Custom, this method delegates to AccoRevit.Addin.Utils.XmlTagCommandConfig.CreateCustom(System.String,System.String).

Exceptions

ArgumentOutOfRangeException

Thrown when tagKind is not supported.
